get.summary: Retrieves a list of computers associated with the specified school.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school for which to fetch the computers.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of dances associated with the specified school.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school whose dances are being retrieved.

get.summary: Retrieves the player information associated with a specific school and computer.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school.

parameters.name: computerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the computer.

get.summary: Retrieves information about a specific school based on the provided school ID.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school to retrieve information for.

get.summary: Retrieves information about a specific school based on the provided school ID using an alternative route.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school to retrieve information for.

get.summary: Retrieves the cover image for a specific song in a school.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school.

parameters.name: songId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the song.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Optional version parameter (ticks) for cache busting and strong caching.

put.summary: Adds a wish associated with a specific school and computer in the system.

parameters.name: schoolId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the school to which the computer belongs.

parameters.name: computerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the computer for which the wish is being added.

requestBody.description: The details of the wish being created, including type and identifier.

id.description: The unique identifier of the computer.

ComputerListDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) containing basic information about a computer.

id.description: The unique identifier of the dance.

name.description: The full name of the dance.

shortName.description: The short or abbreviated name of the dance.

DanceDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object for a dance.

isPlaying.description: Indicates whether the player is actively playing a song.

songs.description: A list of songs currently associated with the player.

isLineDanceMode.description: Indicates if the player is in line dance mode. Default value is false.

PlayerInfoDto.description: Represents information about a player, including its state, current songs, and mode configuration.

PlayerInfosDto.description: Represents comprehensive player information, including details of two individual players.

position.description:
Gets or sets the position of the song in the playlist or queue.
A position of 0 typically represents the currently playing song, while
higher values indicate songs in the upcoming sequence of a playlist.

songId.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier for the song.
This identifier is globally unique and is used to reference
the specific song across various contexts, such as playlist associations
or player behaviors.

startTime.description:
Gets or sets the start time of the song. This represents the time when the song begins playback
or is scheduled to begin in the context of the player's queue or list. The value may be null
if the start time is not determined or relevant in a certain context.

endTime.description:
Gets or sets the ending time of the song playback. This indicates when the song
concludes in the playback timeline. A null value represents that the song has not
ended or the end time is not defined.

title.description:
Gets or sets the title of the song.
This property typically represents the name of the song as it is displayed in a player or playlist.

artist.description:
Gets or sets the name of the artist who performed the song.
This property enables identification of the performer or creator
associated with the given track in the playlist or playing context.

dancesShort.description:
Gets or sets a short description or abbreviation of the dances associated with the song.
This property provides a concise way to represent dance information linked to the song.

dancesLong.description:
Gets or sets the detailed description of the dances associated with the song.
This property typically contains long-form textual representations of dance names
linked to the current song.

dances.description:
Gets or sets the list of dances associated with the song.
Each entry in the list provides detailed dance metadata, including
names and an indication of whether it is marked as primary.

duration.description:
Gets or sets the duration of the song in seconds.
The duration represents the total playback length of the song
and is used to calculate the end time based on the start time
during playback scheduling or timeline adjustments.

year.description:
Gets or sets the release year of the song.
This property typically indicates the year the song was published or first became available to the public.

comment.description:
Gets or sets the user-provided comment associated with the song.
This can include personal notes, feedback, or any additional information
relevant to the context of the song or its usage.

coverImageUrl.description:
Gets or sets the URL for the cover image of the song.
This URL typically points to a resource where the song's associated artwork
or thumbnail image can be retrieved.

isWish.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether the song is marked as a "wish" or a special request.
This property is usually associated with user preferences, indicating that the song holds
specific importance or is flagged for prioritized playback.

remainingSeconds.description:
Gets or sets the remaining playback time of the song in seconds at the moment the update was sent.
Only set for the currently playing song (Position = 0) when IsPlaying is true.
Use this value together with the client's local clock at the time of receiving the message
to calculate the current playback position without requiring clock synchronization.
Replaces the fragile StartTime/EndTime UTC compensation approach.

estimatedSecondsUntilStart.description:
Gets or sets the estimated number of seconds until this song will start playing,
measured from the moment the update was sent.
Only set for upcoming songs (Position > 0) when IsPlaying is true.
Use this value together with the client's local clock at the time of receiving the message
to display a human-readable countdown (e.g. "in 3 Minuten") without requiring clock synchronization.

PlayerSongInfoDto.description: Represents detailed information about a song being played or in a playlist in the context of a player system.

SchoolListDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) containing information about a school.

SongDanceDto.description: Represents a data transfer object for a song and its associated dance information.

type.description: The type of the wish, represented by the FRET.Cloud.Public.Abstractions.Dtos.WishType enum.

id.description: The unique identifier for the wish, typically a string value.

WishCreationDto.description: Represents the data transfer object used for creating a wish.
